textByHash.a5e56dde920e46d5dc267040e66405897f833b14: Hello, chum, fancy buyin' some designer jewellry? They've come all the way from Ardougne! Most pukka!
textByHash.b4c2c66116146055d46b33bbc02acdd14b8463bd: Okay, chum, would you like to show you the very latest potion prices?
textByHash.5fe164198d4a7680fc8494cc8468cd2f1f885d13: Why, I'm Bob! Your friendly seller of smashin' goods!
textByHash.eda84f8e21ab072717afac7c969799a6df2d1322: Oh, not much at the moment. Cuz, ya know, business being so well and cushie.
textByHash.0e4f0383c7a3f1ea24f671018e3a5a2df6b2a39b: You plonka! It's all a show, innit! If I let people knows I'm in good business they'll want a share of the moolah!
textByHash.710bb08e5fc9adc613434955e82ed39ae87c134f: That's the Ardougne way, my son.
textByHash.0668ddf121384cb93bccd75a434f562127bfbcdb: You're a bit short of inventory space.
textByHash.29b33f09d8a736ae6cfbaee983ce300bdc5d172f: You're a bit short of empty vessels or cash. Empty vials cost 5 coins each, cups 8 coins each, and anything else is 5 coins each.
textByHash.8abcb4a392946ea275a1174d726ed0da4daa1702: There, I've done what I can, but you're a bit short of empty vessels or cash. Empty vials cost 5 coins each, cups 8 coins each, and anything else is 5 coins each.
textByHash.17b26194c7c4667a8422f6dbe0dd792a6593509f: Two plus two is four, minus one that's three...
textByHash.8d0b131722e8d09354130b3428d7c3515d0c3472: I don't think you've got anything that I can decant.
